mapper.sql: c.id, c.category_name, c.parent_id, c.category_code, c.description, c.icon, c.sort_order, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.org_id
mapper.select: SELECT , pc.category_name AS parent_name, u.user_name AS create_by_name, o.org_name AS org_name, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM permission_groups pg WHERE pg.category_id = c.id) AS permission_group_count FROM permission_group_categories c LEFT JOIN permission_group_categories pc ON c.parent_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN po_users u ON c.create_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN po_organization o ON c.org_id = o.org_id WHERE c.id = #{id}

WITH RECURSIVE category_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM permission_group_categories WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} UNION ALL SELECT c.id FROM permission_group_categories c INNER JOIN category_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id ) SELECT id FROM category_tree

SELECT c.id AS catalog_id, c.category_name AS catalog_name, CONCAT('-1.', CAST(c.id AS CHAR)) AS catalog_path, 19 AS obj_type, c.parent_id AS parent_catalog_id, c.sort_order AS sort_id, CASE WHEN c.status = 'active' THEN 'A' ELSE 'I' END AS state, c.create_by AS user_id, c.description AS comments, 'N' AS is_system FROM permission_group_categories c
c.status = 'active'
AND c.category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{catalogName}, '%')
AND c.create_by = #{userId}
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.create_time DESC
